data.title: Add .dircolors template for custom ls colors
data.description:
## Summary

Deploy `.dircolors` template from `dotfiles-templates/` to provide custom color schemes for `ls` output based on file types.

## Context

The `dotfiles-templates/.dircolors` provides:

* Custom color codes for different file types
* Archives (tar, zip, gz) in red
* Images (png, jpg, gif) in magenta
* Audio files (mp3, wav) in cyan
* Documents (pdf, doc) in green
* Code files (py, js, sh) in yellow
* Better visual distinction in terminal file listings

## Current State

* ✅ Source template exists: `dotfiles-templates/.dircolors` (also `.dir_colors`)
* ❌ Not deployed by system-setup ansible roles
* ❌ Users rely on system defaults
* ⚠️ zsh 50-aliases.zsh uses system dircolors: `eval "$(dircolors -b)"`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Choose canonical name: `.dircolors` (more common) or `.dir_colors` (legacy)
- [ ] Copy chosen file to `system-setup/roles/03-dotfiles/files/.dircolors`
- [ ] Add deployment task in `roles/03-dotfiles/tasks/main.yml`:

  ```yaml
  - name: Symlink dircolors for users
    ansible.builtin.file:
      src: "{{ role_path }}/files/.dircolors"
      dest: "/home/{{ item.name }}/.dircolors"
      state: link
      force: true
      owner: "{{ item.name }}"
      group: "{{ item.name }}"
    loop: "{{ users }}"
    become: true
  ```
- [ ] Update zsh `50-aliases.zsh.j2` to reference custom dircolors:

  ```bash
  # Current: eval "$(dircolors -b)"
  # New: test -r ~/.dircolors && eval "$(dircolors -b ~/.dircolors)" || eval "$(dircolors -b)"
  ```
- [ ] Test deployment with `./run.sh`
- [ ] Verify colorized ls output in both bash and zsh

## Implementation Notes

* File should be symlinked (not templated) unless users need different color schemes
* Add `.dircolors.local` override mechanism for user customization
* Works with GNU ls (Arch default) - BSD ls uses different format
* Both bash and zsh need to source dircolors in their rc files

## Priority

**Medium** - Nice UX improvement, not critical functionality

## References

* Source: `/home/skogix/skogix/dotfiles-templates/.dircolors`
* Target role: `system-setup/roles/03-dotfiles/`
* Current usage: `roles/03-dotfiles/templates/.config/zsh/50-aliases.zsh.j2`
* Related: Part of dotfiles-templates integration initiative
